strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js as a recurring core stack across multiple senior and staff-level roles
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep, demonstrated testing culture: TDD practitioner, workshop organizer, and author of open-source test runner (Trial) and assertion library (Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright are not mentioned anywhere in the resume despite being explicitly listed in the primary stack and testing requirements
Kotlin is absent from the resume; no JVM-language experience noted beyond older Java references in embedded/robotics contexts
React appears in only one role (Optilyz) without depth; frontend work is consistently less emphasized than backend and infrastructure contributions
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong backend-leaning fullstack candidate whose TypeScript/Node.js experience and current AI agent infrastructure work map closely to the role's core requirements; his testing discipline is well above average, evidenced by open-source tooling and community workshops. The main risk is a gap in the prescribed primary stack—Nest.js, Vitest, and Playwright are not mentioned—and limited React depth, which could mean meaningful onboarding time on frontend and framework conventions; his demonstrated breadth and adaptability across languages and domains, however, suggest these gaps are learnable rather than fundamental.
